skilllist.skilldesc:
After dealing damage, Aulus adds a stack of <font color="a6aafb">Fighting Spirit</font> to his axe per second for 4s (up to 6 stacks). Each stack grants 7.5 (+0.5*Hero Level)% Attack Speed. At max <font color="a6aafb">Fighting Spirit</font> stacks, Aulus's Basic Attack is enhanced and gains Attack Range.

Enhanced Basic Attack: Aulus slams his axe into the ground, dealing <font color="fba51f"> (+75% Total Physical Attack)</font> (+ 4 (+0.4*Hero Level)% target's Max HP) <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to enemies in a line.

Aulus starts accumulating <font color="a6aafb">Fighting Spirit</font>, removes all slow effects, and gains 30% extra Movement Speed for 5s.

If Aulus does not take high-level control effects within 2s, he will enter the <font color="a6aafb">Enraged</font> state and gain Control Immunity.

Aulus swings his axe, dealing 240<font color="fba51f"> (+100% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to enemies in a fan-shaped area and slowing them by 30% for 2s.

Upon hitting an enemy, Aulus can cast this skill again to dash forward and smash the ground, dealing 240<font color="fba51f"> (+100% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to nearby enemies.

Aulus repeatedly swings his axe at nearby enemies, dealing 150<font color="fba51f"> (+60% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> each time. After 4 strikes, Aulus briefly charges before unleashing a wider slash, dealing 450<font color="fba51f"> (+180% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to enemies in a large area.

During this skill, Aulus gains 20% Damage Reduction and a short burst of Movement Speed with each slash.

data.name: Aulus

__data.skilldesc:
Deal 520 (+80*Hero Level) <font color="ffe63c">True Damage</font> to the target Creep or Minion.
<font color="62f8fe">Passive</font>: Increases Creep rewards by 60% and reduces damage taken from basic Creeps by 40%. Cannot share Minion rewards with allied heroes in the first 2 min.
<font color="62f8fe">Blessing:</font> Accumulate 5 Creep kills, hero kills, or assists to upgrade the spell according to the Jungling Boots' Blessing, and 15 kills or assists to gain 10 Physical Attack and Magic Power and 100 Max HP.

equiplist.equipskill1: Fortitude: CC and Slow Duration reduced by 25%
equiplist.equipskill2: Hunter: After dealing damage to a Creep, deal 40(+3*Hero Level) + (+0.01 Total HP) True Damage to the target over 3s (damage is increased by 100% for non-Marksmen heroes).
equiplist.equipskilldesc:
Fortitude: CC and Slow Duration reduced by 25%
Hunter: After dealing damage to a Creep, deal 40(+3*Hero Level) + (+0.01 Total HP) True Damage to the target over 3s (damage is increased by 100% for non-Marksmen heroes).

equiplist.equipskill1:
Fighting Spirit: Attacks grant 12 extra Physical Attack per second for 4s, up to 6 stacks. Deals extra 10% True Damage based on the damage dealt (no damage reduction counted) at full stacks.
<font color="A4AAC7">Marksmen, Mages, and Supports only receive 50% of these stacked effects</font>.

recommendmasterplan.name: 疑犯_Yifan
recommendmasterplan.title: Influencer

data.story: A Leonin warrior who inherited his predecessor's resolve, cleaving his own path with burning ferocity.

assist.desc: Aulus is a dive Fighter and he thrives with reliable ranged Support, such as Angela and Floryn.

strong.desc: Aulus's strong engage and sustained combat capabilities, along with his Control Immunity, makes him a good counter to squishy, low-mobility heroes like Hanabi, Miya, and Gord.

weak.desc: Since Aulus's damage relies on landing his enhanced Basic Attacks, heroes who can keep him at bay and avoid them are a tough matchup, such as Franco, Melissa, and Karina.
